Interface  IP Address / IP Netmask     Admin  Protocol  VRRP-IP
---------  -------------------------   -----  --------  -------
vlan 20    10.20.0.1 / 255.255.255.0   Up     Up        0.0.0.0
vlan 40    10.40.1.1 / 255.255.255.0   Up     Up        0.0.0.0
mgmt       192.0.2.10 / 255.255.255.0  Up     Up        0.0.0.0
